segments.speaker: Alice
segments.text: Good morning everyone. Let's get started with our standup. I'll go first.

segments.speaker: Alice
segments.text: Yesterday I finished the authentication refactor for the user service. Got the PR merged after code review.

segments.speaker: Alice
segments.text: Today I'm going to start on the rate limiting middleware. Should have a draft PR by end of day.

segments.speaker: Alice
segments.text: No blockers on my end.

segments.speaker: Bob
segments.text: Nice work on the auth refactor, Alice. My turn.

segments.speaker: Bob
segments.text: Yesterday I was debugging the WebSocket disconnection issue. Found the root cause — it was a race condition in the heartbeat handler.

segments.speaker: Bob
segments.text: Today I'll push the fix and write regression tests for it.

segments.speaker: Bob
segments.text: One blocker — I need access to the staging Redis cluster to verify the fix. Can someone help me with that?

segments.speaker: Alice
segments.text: I can get you access after standup. Just ping me on Slack.

segments.speaker: Bob
segments.text: Perfect, thanks Alice.

segments.speaker: Charlie
segments.text: Alright, my turn. Yesterday I worked on the new dashboard design. Got the wireframes approved by the design team.

segments.speaker: Charlie
segments.text: Today I'm going to start implementing the React components for the dashboard. Starting with the metrics cards.

segments.speaker: Charlie
segments.text: I have a question — should we use the existing chart library or switch to the new one that the design team recommended?

segments.speaker: Alice
segments.text: Let's take that offline. Can you put together a quick comparison and we'll discuss in our tech sync tomorrow?

segments.speaker: Charlie
segments.text: Sure, I'll do that. No other blockers from me.

segments.speaker: Alice
segments.text: Great. Quick reminder — sprint review is on Friday at 2pm. Make sure your demos are ready.

segments.speaker: Bob
segments.text: Got it. My WebSocket fix should be demo-ready by then.

segments.speaker: Charlie
segments.text: I'll have at least the metrics cards done for the demo.

segments.speaker: Alice
segments.text: Sounds good. Let's wrap up. Have a productive day everyone!

segments.speaker: Bob
segments.text: Thanks, you too!
